Warning.Title: Warning
Warning.NoAccount: You are not logged in! Please log in to play multiplayer.
Warning.Offline: Couldn't connect to the multiplayer server. Do you want to try again?
Warning.Outdated: Current mod version ({0}) is outdated. Please update to the latest version ({1}) to play multiplayer!

MainMenu.Title: Multiplayer
MainMenu.Description:
Welcome to the <color=f5428aff>Multiplayer</color>! ヽ(・∀・)ﾉ 

Here you can play against other players, customize your profile, earn achievements, add friends and more!

Click "Lobbies" to play with your friends or 
"Competitive" to play against random people.
MainMenu.LocalPlayerBanned: You have been banned from multiplayer servers. If you wish to appeal please contact @cvle. or @taypexx in discord.

ProfileWindow.Title: Profile
ProfileWindow.DecideUnfriendPrompt: Are you sure you want to unfriend this person?

Achievements.Title: Achievements
Achievements.Welcome!: Launch the multiplayer for the first time.
Achievements.Autoplay.dll: Reach the top rank in the multiplayer.

Lobbies.Title: Lobbies
Lobbies.Description:
<color=1eff00ff>Public</color> lobbies are open to everyone as long as they are not full.

<color=f5428aff>Private</color> lobbies require you to enter their name and password in order to join.

If you don't want to join someone's lobby you can create your own.
Lobbies.IncorrectID: Lobby with this ID doesn't exist!

PublicLobbies.Title: Public Lobbies
PublicLobbies.Description:
Pick the one you like the most.

 (˙꒳​˙)
PublicLobbies.DescriptionEmpty:
There are no public lobbies available right now.

 〜(＞＜)〜

LobbyCreation.Title: Create a lobby
LobbyCreation.Description:
<color=f5428aff>{0}</color>

[ Max Players ]: <color={1}>{2}</color>
[ Password ]: <color={3}>{4}</color>
[ Goal ]: <color={5}>{6}</color>
[ Charts ]: <color={7}>{8}</color>
[ Chart Selection Mode ]: <color={9}>{10}</color>
LobbyCreation.LobbyNameInvalid: Lobby name length must be between {0} and {1}!
LobbyCreation.MaxPlayersInvalid: Maximum amount of players in lobby must be between {0} and {1}!
LobbyCreation.PasswordInvalid: Password length must be between {0} and {1}!
LobbyCreation.GoalDescription: Define the condition under which players will be compared.
LobbyCreation.PlayTypeDescription: Define the range of charts everyone will be playing.
LobbyCreation.ChartSelectionDescription: Define the way charts are going to be queued and played.

Lobby.Title: Lobby
Lobby.Description:
<color=f5428aff>{0}</color>
ID: {1}

[ Host ]: <color=fff700ff>{2}</color>
[ Players ]: {3}/{4}
[ Status ]: <color={5}>{6}</color>
[ Charts ]: <color={7}>{8}</color>
[ Locked ]: {9}
Lobby.LeavePrompt: Are you sure you want to leave this lobby?
Lobby.DisbandPrompt: Are you sure you want to disband this lobby? Everyone will be kicked out.
Lobby.PlaylistDescription: To add a chart to the playlist open it and click the corresponding button.
